questions: permaculture ar organic farming er difference ki?
answers: Permaculture is a design system for creating sustainable human habitats by following nature's patterns. It integrates agriculture, ecology, and community design into self-sustaining systems.
Permaculture holo nature er pattern follow kore sustainable farming ar living system design kora. Eta just farming na — puro lifestyle design.
Permaculture uses principles like observe and interact, catch and store energy, produce no waste, and use renewable resources. It creates food forests, rain gardens, and integrated ecosystems.

Permaculture goes beyond organic farming — it designs entire ecosystems where plants, animals, water systems, and humans work together sustainably. It was developed by Bill Mollison and David Holmgren.
